title: DataQualityReportBatchResponse
description: Response containing the results for a batch of data quality report aggregations.

dataQualityReportResult.description: Result for a single data quality report request in a batch.

key.description: Key used to correlate this result with its originating request.

report.description: Aggregation result. Present when the request succeeded.

error.description: Error message. Present when the request failed.

results.description: Results for each request. Match to requests by key; order is not guaranteed.
